sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, startdate TIMESTAMPTZ, enddate TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-30 23:59:59', TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-10-01 01:58:00');
SELECT id, date_sub('hour', startdate, enddate) AS hours_diff FROM test_dates WHERE startdate IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num1 INT, num2 INT);
SELECT num1, num2, date_sub('hour', TIMESTAMPTZ '2021-01-01 12:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2021-01-01 14:00:00') | num1 AS bitwise_result FROM test_numbers;
SELECT id, (date_sub('hour', startdate, enddate) | (SELECT num1 FROM test_numbers)) AS complex_result FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE edge_test (a VARCHAR, b INT, c FLOAT, d TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT a, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edge_test WHERE b < 10) + NULL AS null_test FROM edge_test GROUP BY a HAVING (SUM(b) | (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edge_test)) > 0;
SELECT (date_sub('hour', startdate, enddate) | 2) AS edge_case OR NULL AS combined_result FROM test_dates ORDER BY combined_result DESC;
SELECT a, date_sub('hour', startdate, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00' + (b | 4)) AS mixed_test FROM (SELECT * FROM test_dates JOIN test_numbers ON test_dates.id = test_numbers.num1) AS combined;
